title: Darki UI (Dark + OreUi)
description: OreUI and aesthetics in one UI! Wait... DARK WITH I???
body:
# **IN TESTING PHASE!**
> **This texture is still in its betaversion, most interfaces are not ready and everything is subject to change!**
> 
<details>
<summary>Dev Log 1 - Future of DarkiUI!</summary>

### Uh... hello, maybe we need to talk a lot...

**As you can see, Darki UI hasn't had an update in 3 months, and it will remain that way for quite some time.** Unfortunately, creating a texture also requires programming, something I don't have experience in and I needed a lot of help with. Unfortunately, I'm currently without help, so some texts are still slow to display (one of the main reasons for needing help), in addition to adjustments that can only be made in .json/.mcmeta...

The second reason is that I want to redo most of the sprites/UI. Currently, all the content was created in Figma; I want to migrate everything to an art software. Although there is the limitation of editing one by one, the benefit will be that I can make the UI more vibrant and unique. :D

Lastly, for now, **I will only dedicate myself to updating DarkiUI to version 1.21.10+.** Making it compatible with multiple versions is complicated (mainly because of the annoying compatibility warning), so **don't expect DarkiUI versions for versions below 1.21.10+.**

**That's all for now, thank you for your attention.**
</details>

![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b75b436ab2607fac6d65a2094288f8dc32f906d.png)
# About DarkiUI
> DarkiUI is a texture that merges the OreUI theme and adds a pleasant and fun aesthetic to the UIs you interact with!

# DarkiUI Features
> Everything that is available (in customizable/unique factor) in the texture, plus pending features

| Features            | Current Status |
| ------------------- | -------------- |
| Customizable buttons| ✅ |
| Inventory UI        | ✅ |
| Creative UI         | ✅ |
| Recipe book         | ✅ |
| Craft table UI      | 🔶 |
| Furnace UI          | 🔶 |
| Inventory UI        | ✅ |
| Chest UI            | ✅ |
| Shulker box UI      | ✅ (but, only the default color)|
| Enchanting table UI | ✅ |
| Grindstone UI       | ✅ |
| Villager UI         | ✅ |
| Other UIs           | ✅/🔶 |

# **Mod support**
> Texture intends to offer DarkiUi for some mods after the beta.

---
# **Help improve Darki UI!**
> Answer [this form](https://forms.gle/4i9Bx7ddodQdXcXT9) giving your feedback and suggestions! Test, respond and turn this texture into reality in your final version!

# **EI! Você é brasileiro? Doe!**
> Olá, meu nome é Luiz, criador da textura, se você quizer mim ajudar de qualquer forma, ode atravez da chave pix que estrá diponivel no Link de doação ao lado!
---
